title: NEW Gemini Features Explained — How to Use Google’s Latest AI Upgrade
summary: Google released Gemini 3.5 Flash, a multimodal AI model with capabilities including vision analysis, video understanding, code generation, structured output, and workspace automation. The video demonstrates eight real-world workflows including contract analysis, receipt parsing, app coding, and workspace agentic chains across Google's ecosystem.
